'''zhapubu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:mycetophilid|mycetophilid]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-p-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mycetophilid|mycetophilid]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| zhapubu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhæpibith|zhæpibith]] || [[word:zhæpibij|zhæpibij]] || [[word:zhæpibish|zhæpibish]] || [[word:zhæpibi|zhæpibi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhapupubuth|zhapupubuth]] || [[word:zhapupubuj|zhapupubuj]] || [[word:zhapupubush|zhapupubush]] || [[word:zhapupubu|zhapupubu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhapubuth|zhapubuth]] || [[word:zhapubuj|zhapubuj]] || [[word:zhapubush|zhapubush]] || [[word:zhapubu|zhapubu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhapufbuth|zhapufbuth]] || [[word:zhapufbuj|zhapufbuj]] || [[word:zhapufbush|zhapufbush]] || [[word:zhapufbuf|zhapufbuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zhapubuthu|zhapubuthu]] || [[word:zhapubuju|zhapubuju]] || [[word:zhapubushu|zhapubushu]] || [[word:zhapubuku|zhapubuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zhapubuth|zhapubuth]] || [[word:zhapubuj|zhapubuj]] || [[word:zhapubush|zhapubush]] || [[word:zhapubu|zhapubu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zhapubuthul|zhapubuthul]] || [[word:zhapubujul|zhapubujul]] || [[word:zhapubushul|zhapubushul]] || [[word:zhapubukul|zhapubukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zhapubuthuthu|zhapubuthuthu]] || [[word:zhapubujuju|zhapubujuju]] || [[word:zhapubushushu|zhapubushushu]] || [[word:zhapubuku|zhapubuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zhapubuthun|zhapubuthun]] || [[word:zhapubujun|zhapubujun]] || [[word:zhapubushun|zhapubushun]] || [[word:zhapubukun|zhapubukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zhapubuthuoro|zhapubuthuoro]] || [[word:zhapubujuoro|zhapubujuoro]] || [[word:zhapubushuoro|zhapubushuoro]] || [[word:zhapubukuoro|zhapubukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d2c7592}}
